title: Threads, Atomics, Data Races, and Safe Reclamation · Object-Lifetime Lens: Data Race Undefined
summary: A lock-free metrics cache removes nodes while readers still hold addresses and ordinary tests rarely reproduce the race. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem data race undefined increment in threaded lifetime and reclamation proof. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Identify conflicting non-atomic accesses without happens-before ordering as undefined behavior.
Design one lifecycle object that owns nested memory and operating-system resources with failure-atomic construction.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Data Race Undefined · Theory Data Race Undefined
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory native-systems team handles memory case 6087. Produce bounded C evidence to model publication and reclamation state without claiming thread proof; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Identify conflicting non-atomic accesses without happens-before ordering as undefined behavior.
